programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E28 - Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: E14 - Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E45 - Double Trouble
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: E88 - Listen
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E24 - Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E15 - First Day On Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: E15 - Plate Escape
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: E16 - Sometimes I Make Cakes
programme.desc: Flipping pancakes, baking cakes, and homemade sauce from the shops, the animals share all the things they love about cooking.

programme.title: E42 - It's Time To Bake Gingerbread Pandas
programme.desc: It's snowing outside, but JoJo and Gran Gran are cosy in the kitchen making gingerbread biscuits. JoJo knows exactly what shape to make. There's plenty of help from Ned, Monty and Jared too.

programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E45 - Double Trouble
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: E88 - Listen
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E24 - Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E15 - First Day On Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: E15 - Plate Escape
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: E16 - Sometimes I Make Cakes
programme.desc: Flipping pancakes, baking cakes, and homemade sauce from the shops, the animals share all the things they love about cooking.

programme.title: E42 - It's Time To Bake Gingerbread Pandas
programme.desc: It's snowing outside, but JoJo and Gran Gran are cosy in the kitchen making gingerbread biscuits. JoJo knows exactly what shape to make. There's plenty of help from Ned, Monty and Jared too.

programme.title: E101 - Leonardo Stands Alone
programme.desc: The Ninja Turtles are on the run and...alone. Leonardo is a leader but who is he without anyone to lead? Leo now has to stop Bishop and her Mechazoids while trying to save his brothers.

programme.title: E204 - Mutiny on the Krusty

programme.title: E308 - Unidentified Flailing Octopus
programme.desc: Squidward sets out to prove that aliens aren't real...until he has a close encounter of his own.

programme.title: E213 - Best Summer Ever! Part 1 / Best Summer Ever! Part 2
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: E907 - The Kanga-ruse / The Walking Bed
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: E314 - Scales of Justice / Crimes of Fashion
programme.desc: When Lana learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction she springs into action. // When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E3 - Powering Up Earth Week
programme.desc: Gecko is powering up for Earth Week! He builds a wind turbine to provide clean energy for Kat’s Base. Then, he converts Bobby the Bus & Dylan the Dump Truck to electric engines to make them cleaner! The eco-friendly work continues as Gecko cleans up a polluted river, teaches Weasel how to sort waste & helps Mama Recycle win a recycling race!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Wildlife Wonders
programme.desc: Discover Earth Week wildlife wonders with Blippi! He meets Jabari the lion to learn how to roar & sneak in the savannah. Then, the BlippiMobile goes underwater to communicate with dolphins & get an ocean tour from a jellyfish! The wild adventures continue as Blippi meets a panda in the rainforest, jumps with a kangaroo in Australia & learns how bees make honey inside a hive!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E10 - Exploring Nature For Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready for exploring nature for Earth Week! Baby John goes camping & overcomes his fear of the dark by looking at beautiful stars. Then, the family visits the Grand Canyon to see eagles & lizards! The nature fun continues with a trip to the lake for swimming & fishing. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the park & the family plants a tree to take care of the environment!

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: Dialogue

programme.title: Trip to Siberia
programme.desc: While Zoe and Milo warm up inside, Alim suggests skating. The kids doubt it's possible in such cold. To prove them wrong, Alim takes them to Siberia. There, Sergei shows them Siberian life-permafrost, stilt houses, and melting ice for water.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Sponge
programme.desc: Let's get creative using a sponge and see what Hepi and Briko are up to.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Elephant - Crush
programme.desc: The elephant accidentally stands on a flower and is upset that he has crushed the innocent thing. He does everything he can to revive the flower, but things get worse before they get better. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Lighting the Solar System
programme.desc: What's the best way to remember the colours of the rainbow? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light in space. Have hands-on fun by creating a kaleidoscope, and get to know Wang Zhenyi, who originated her own exact model of the solar system.

programme.title: Ebb and the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Granny reads to Flo about a local legendary sea monster. On the way home from Granny's, in the dinghy Ebb and Bird make a mysterious new friend who likes to play with Ebb's squeaky ball and seems to guard them all the way home.

programme.title: Childhood
programme.desc: Children of noble stock receive an education in a castle environment while peasant offspring spend their youth working in the fields or at home. Daily life is busy, from a very young age. But kids never forget to have fun and goof around or playing pranks on each other.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Cactus
programme.desc: Henry meets a Cactus in a garden centre. He becomes a Sheriff in the Wild West and Cactus becomes his deputy.

programme.title: Bianca Ciocirlan: Hoverboard Performer
programme.desc: Young hoverboard artist Bianca Ciocirlan shares how she became the best in the world, achieving forty-five pirouettes on a hoverboard in thirty seconds. Bianca is also a professional hoverboard performer and former figure skater.

programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Lighting the Solar System
programme.desc: What's the best way to remember the colours of the rainbow? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light in space. Have hands-on fun by creating a kaleidoscope, and get to know Wang Zhenyi, who originated her own exact model of the solar system.

programme.title: Sponge
programme.desc: Let's get creative using a sponge and see what Hepi and Briko are up to.

programme.title: Blue Planet
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery are at the spaceport. But while preparing to embark on an expedition into space, they fall into the ocean, which becomes the destination of their new adventures.

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Milo doesn't know what to do with his old broken skateboard. Zoe thinks it is useless, so it just needs to be thrown away, but Alim thinks otherwise. He knows that his friend Baidi can recycle anything and everything. Off they go to Senegal to meet Baidi!

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.title: Mushroom Shaped Cookies
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula use cookie dough to make various fun shapes, including mushrooms, showing kids the joy of creative baking.

programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery are at the spaceport. But while preparing to embark on an expedition into space, they fall into the ocean, which becomes the destination of their new adventures.

programme.desc: Originally from Brittany, Julien Hennote set sail at 20 for Polynesia. There, the young chef discovered the art of raw fish, coconut milk with a unique taste, and above all, Taha'a vanilla. On today's menu: scallop tartare and vanilla cauliflower.

programme.title: E37 - In Uzes (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Uzes fougasse and in its Roman aqueduct.

programme.title: E1 - Climate Change And Mining
programme.desc: Simultaneously linked to Yukon's history and essential to its economy, how is the mining industry being affected by climate warming, and above all, what is it doing to be part of the solution?

programme.title: E37 - In Uzes (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Uzes fougasse and in its Roman aqueduct.

programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.title: E16 - Eco-Friendly Fashion And Craftwork
programme.desc: Sustainable development, eco-friendly, up-cycling: a whole new vocabulary that represents the way the world is changing. We take a look at how it's affecting the worlds of fashion (Akho, Bleu.M, North Hill), beauty (Savonnerie du Midi, Ormaie Paris) and design (Mona Oren, Au Passeur de Lumiere).

programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.title: E3 - Passing On
programme.desc: Paquet House is supporting two families with their restoration adventures. Elisa Gouin has inherited a family passion for her ancestral home. And a traditional builder passes on his know-how to his son.

programme.title: E2 - Effects Of Climate Change And Hydrology
programme.desc: The North which is warming brings its share of extreme climate events, in particular water rising, for the inhabitants of Yukon. How can human ingenuity, mutual aid and Indigenous wisdom help us confront the inevitable?

programme.title: E16 - Eco-Friendly Fashion And Craftwork
programme.desc: Sustainable development, eco-friendly, up-cycling: a whole new vocabulary that represents the way the world is changing. We take a look at how it's affecting the worlds of fashion (Akho, Bleu.M, North Hill), beauty (Savonnerie du Midi, Ormaie Paris) and design (Mona Oren, Au Passeur de Lumiere).

programme.title: E5 - Special Salad
programme.desc: Salad takes center stage. Served with grilled beef, zucchini and corn, or made with halloumi and roasted sweet potatoes, there's something for everyone.

programme.title: E10 - 馬來「囧途」 開啟別樣文化之旅
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E8 - 橫掃江蘇的味覺版圖
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E8 - 橫掃江蘇的味覺版圖

programme.title: E10 - Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Kentucky based Top Chef alum Ed Lee drops by for a Quickfire that’s part trivia, part culinary creativity. programme.title: Distinction
programme.desc: Ms Tsui is a music teacher in a special education needs (SEN) school, who is not able to switch to a mainstream school due to stereotyping and labelling; Zoey is an underachiever from a Band 1 school, who is struggling for the coming public examination; Ka Ho is a rebellious teenager from a Band 3 school, who idles away his time and doesn't care about his handicapped little brother...Fate drives the three to take part in a musical they deem worthless for their own purposes, which turns out to be a journey of self-discovery towards their dreams and goals.

programme.title: Along With The Gods: The Last 49 Days
programme.desc: Su-hong and his 3 Afterlife Guardians journey through 7 hells in order for all them to be reincarnated, while a household god defies all rules to help ordinary people in the living world. And the afterlife guardian's tragic lives on earth thousand years ago are uncovered one by one during their battle against the god in human world.

programme.title: All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: Why Is There A Black Market For Refrigerants In The Eu, And How Does It Wor
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. But not all gases are illegal , so tracing illicit imports is difficult. Sanctions are low, profits are high. The global warming potential of one 10kg cylinder is the same as driving 1.5 times around the world.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Why Is There A Black Market For Refrigerants In The Eu, And How Does It Wor

programme.title: How Ai, Recycling And Energy Tech Collide With Real‑World Limits
programme.desc: A premature foal survives thanks to an AI camera detecting a critical emergency. The same technology spots colic in horses and lameness in cows - reshaping modern livestock care.

programme.title: E2 - In Flight Meals
programme.desc: Go hunting with flyers who excel at making mid-air catches. Watch the metamorphosis of the acrobatic emperor dragonfly, admire the barn owl’s stealthy approach to prey, and catch a wandering salamander’s death-defying leap into the abyss.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - Seasonal Shores
programme.desc: Strap in for a thrilling ride as Lizzie travels by air, land, and sea to meet Alaskan wildlife and visit the world’s remotest corners. Eavesdrop on underwater Arctic residents with scientists, dine with polar bears, and scavenge with bald eagles.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E3 - Orangutan
programme.desc: Investigate the art of nest making with the jungle’s master builder: the orangutan. Shadow Max as he tries to escape the insect-filled floor of the Borneo rainforest and takes inspiration from this solitary primate’s natural engineering prowess.

programme.title: E2 - A Close Encounter
programme.desc: Feel the heat as rising temps mean that water is getting scarce. The Manzi pack must stand alongside predators to hydrate at a remaining precious water spot. Hunt with Weka’s pack to feed the pups, and watch the Stork Colony thrive against all odds.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: E4 - Chimpanzee
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he’s a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socializing.

Gen-X Cops
programme.desc: To fight against the new era criminals, Inspector Chan struggles for picking up a group of brand new cadets to become his new team called the 'Gen-X-Cops'...

programme.title: Para Para Sakura
programme.desc: Phillip Wong, a colour-blind dance instructor who is devoted to the Japanese Para Para. He meets Yee, a spoiled rich girl and an attraction begins to form between the two...

programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. He is first snubbed but later comforted by Fong in a gymnasium where he helps her dodge arresting traffic policemen. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: Aces Go Places III
programme.desc: King Kong is commissioned by a man who claims to be Mr. Bond, special agent from the British Secret Service to recover for the Queen precious stones stolen from her crown which are now in Hong Kong. Back in Hong Kong, a Secret Service man from the Bond Street Headquarters, Mr. Tom Collins, has just arrived to find out a gang of notorious international crooks led by Mr. Bond. Carried out his mission successfully for Mr. Bond, King Kong is summoned by the Governor to assist Collins in retrieving the stolen goods and catch Mr. Bond's gang.

programme.title: E1 - Food’s New Frontiers
programme.desc: Space foods, initially created just for astronauts, has now facilitated a revolution in agricultural and alternative food production. This revolution is changing the way we think about producing food in the future. In Finland, protein-rich foods are produced from thin air, making food production possible in a variety of environments, including deserts, cities, and even outer space. Scientists in the United States are working to make mushroom cultivation more sustainable, while in Austria, seeds are exposed to space radiation to improve their yield when grown back on Earth. A startup in Singapore is using space technology to enhance the security of livestock herds, and at NUS, a team has developed a remarkable hydrogel that makes crop cultivation more water-efficient.

programme.title: E2 - Food For Space Helps Planet Earth
programme.desc: How will research to live in space in the future benefit us on Earth today? In the Netherlands, we meet a team of researchers working with Martian and Lunar soil to grow crops and mealworms as food. In Thailand, scientists test the effects of varying gravity on the next superfood - watermeal. Meanwhile, an astounding transformation of agriculture is underway in Australia, with crop cultivation methods increasing output by 100%. With a cultivated beef firm in Israel racing to grow meat in space and a Singaporean company using microalgae to produce protein-rich foods, we learn how less is more for food production. Inspired by the similarity between disaster areas and outer space, a Japanese entrepreneur creates jellies to provide nutrition to earthquake victims and astronauts. As the space industry in Singapore grows, collaborations between countries and students’ interests in outer space deepen, leading to a transformation in space-for-humanity research.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: A Love Story
programme.desc: Ian Montes, a wealthy and emotionally scarred businessman, finds himself torn between two women who represent different kinds of love. Joanna, a compassionate doctor, offers stability and emotional healing, while Karyn, a young and adventurous flight attendant, brings excitement and passion into his life. Caught between commitment and desire, Ian must confront his fears of abandonment and learn the true meaning of unconditional love and forgiveness.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Aaja Nachle
programme.desc: Dia returns home to find her beloved dance theatre facing demolition. Determined to save it, she inspires the indifferent townspeople to join a dance performance and fight for its survival. Release Year: 2007 Director: Anil Mehta Awards: IIFA Award: Best Choreography: Vaibhavi Merchant

programme.title: Badmaash Company
programme.desc: Karan, a middle-class graduate, is heartbroken when his mother sells her jewelry for his father's treatment. Determined to fix it, he hatches a plan to get rich fast, risking everything. Release Year: 2010 Director: Parmeet Sethi

programme.title: Beta
programme.desc: Raju is the only child of a widowed multimillionaire. Raju's father can provide him anything he wants, but Raju's only desire is his mother's love. Release Year: 1992 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: Filmfare Awards - Best Actor: Anil Kapoor, Best ActreSS: Madhuri Dixit, Best Supporting ActreSS: Aruna Irani, Best Playback Singer Female: Anuradha Paudwal

programme.title: Munna Michael
programme.desc: Mahinder, a gangster, hires Munna, a street dancer, to train him so that he can impress his ladylove, Dolly. However, when Dolly goes missing, Munna promises to bring her back. Release Year: 2017 Director: Sabir Khan Awards: 2018 Winner Jury's Choice Award- Best Debut ActreSS- Nidhhi Agerwal

programme.title: Rafoo Chakkar
programme.desc: Two friends witness a murder by three criminals. They flee the scene, with the criminals in hot pursuit. What one of the criminals does not know is that he is out to kill his own son.

programme.title: Only The River Flows
programme.desc: An inspector delves into the behaviors of his fellow citizens in order to catch a serial murderer.

programme.title: The Wife
programme.desc: A wife questions her life choices as she travels to Stockholm to see her husband receive the Nobel Prize for Literature.

programme.title: Thriller Thursday: Lady Macbeth
programme.desc: In 19th Century rural England, a young bride sold into marriage begins a passionate affair with a worker on her estate.

programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。
